hero.headline: Custom Square-powered websites. That's all we do.

sections.lede: We don't run ads. We don't sell courses. We don't do SEO audits. We build sites that connect to your Square, run on your domain, and look like you care.
included: Full Square integration — catalog, bookings, orders, customers, whatever you use
sections.pricing: {{OZ_FILL: price stance — explicit tier, "from $X", or "chat for quote"}}
sections.timeline: 2–4 weeks from kickoff to live site.
